THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARMORE, MARK BOCK, BARBARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JC INTERIOR SOURCES $4,232.29 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,282.29, THE COURT ORDERS RECISSION OF THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. WITHIN 10 DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL, PLAINTIFF SHALL RETURN THE SUBJECT FURNITURE TO DEFENDANT; AND DEFENDANT SHALL RETURN THE SUM OF $4232.29 TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
